final:
module JK_FF (
    input J,
    input K,
    input rst,
    output reg Q
);

always @(posedge rst) begin
    case ({J, K})
        2'b00: Q <= Q;         // No change
        2'b01: Q <= 0;         // Reset
        2'b10: Q <= 1;         // Set
        2'b11: Q <= ~Q;        // Toggle
    endcase
end

endmodule
